feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)

entry.title: Your Love Warms My Bones
entry.summary:
Author: PageTurnerEm

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,176Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Merlin has been waiting for Arthur's return for centuries. When Merlin agrees to attends a renaissance faire with his friend. Arthur comes back and wanders into the renaissance faire thinking that he is back home. They meet again, But will it be the same? Will they have to courage to say what they have wanted to for so long?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,170,978Chapters: 140/?Kudos: 1,734

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 399,025Chapters: 84/110Kudos: 3,734

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: sword_and_shield_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,174Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Arthur is the Detective Chief Inspector of the CaPD (Camelot Police Department). Merlin works there as a forensic scientist. Although they're attracted to each other, their relationship is nothing more than physical relief and, most importantly for Arthur, secret.Together they solve cases involving magic, even though Merlin hasn't shared his most important secret with Arthur yet. For good reason. After all, sorcerers are despised in the eyes of the Pendragons. Will they eventually acknowledge their feelings for each other and admit them? Until then, they have a bumpy, painful, and eye-opening road ahead.

entry.summary:
Author: Skdbhdnz

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,284Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 157

entry.title: If I told you myself
entry.summary:
Author: riverray

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 138,804Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 1,221

Summary: Merlin can’t remember the last time he’s locked his bedroom door, if ever. But he chooses not to think about it. He merely sulks his way back to his bed, taking a moment to contemplate taking off his trousers and tunic from the night before. He decides not to think about that either. Instead, he decides not to think at all. He just falls back into his bed, covers up his body more so in shame than for warmth, and closes his eyes.   Basically Merlin is sexually assaulted and this story follows how he and everyone else deals with it. Spoiler alert: THEY DON'T HANDLE IT WELL.

entry.title: don’t blame me (love made me crazy)
entry.summary:
Author: Isthisusernameavailableornot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,499Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 140

Summary: Once upon a time, long, long ago—well, more like 20 years ago—Ygraine married Uther in front of all the people of Camelot. Instead of a honeymoon, Uther purged all the kingdoms of magic and brought decades of stability to the land.He rounded up all the sorcerers and their sidekicks—basically, all the really interesting people—and he booted them off to the Isle of the Lost with a magical barrier to keep them there.That’s where Merlin grew up: no magic and no way out. Or so he thought.Prince Arthur grew up in a peaceful land, surrounded by his people, who were devoted to him, and parents who loved him. Still, there was always a shadow cast onto Camelot by the Isle that loomed just on the horizon.His first proclamation as Crown Prince sends shockwaves through the kingdom: four misfits from the Isle are to be brought into Camelot.Chaos ensues. Or, a Descendants-inspired fic.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,539Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 71

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury.Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own .Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other.There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet.But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it.---------------------------A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed) Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: My Kingdom Come Undone
entry.summary:
Author: Isthisusernameavailableornot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 987Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Only a few months into the Happily Ever After they’ve settled into, the illusion of perfect shatters when Merlin’s secret unravels. As trust fractures and silence grows between them, a visiting king takes advantage of the growing rift, leaving Merlin with blood on his hands and nowhere left to run. Arthur thinks he’s hunting a murderer. Merlin thinks he’s fleeing a man he’s already lost. They’re both wrong.

entry.title: Blind Loyalty
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,992Chapters: 9/10Kudos: 31

Summary: The laws of Camelot are clear: no animal that does not serve for hunting may cross the castle walls. But when the new King Arthur discovers that his closest advisor has defied the rules for a small, snow-white, blind puppy, the destiny of Albion takes an unexpected turn. Amidst secrets shared with the most loyal knights, Morgana's cunning, and the warmth of a love that defies royal decrees, a new law is about to be written... one dictated by the heart.   Note:** Story created with the help of AI, but all ideas are my own. Tags will be added as the story progresses. I should mention that English isn't my first language, so I apologize if there are any spelling mistakes throughout the fanfic. The chapters will be short, I'm warning you now, but that doesn't make it any less of an important story.

entry.title: Scales and Ice
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,740Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 23

Summary: This is the Merlin/Heated Rivalry crossover no one asked for but I decided to write any way. Shane, Ilya, and Svetlana unexpectedly find themselves in Camelot. Will they find their way home? Do they decide to stay? And what does Morgana think about all of this?
